def negative_torch_no_grad_missing_in_inference():
    rule_id = "torch_no_grad_missing_in_inference"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Torch inference paths show no visible no_grad() or inference_mode() guard."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
